jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Radiologist at RML Hospital
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at RML Hospital. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Radiologist to strengthen our Madurai-based team.

About RML Hospital:
RML Hospital is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in CPT Codes

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual performance appraisal
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Madurai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with RML Hospital!
